trigger: dictionary KeyError when accessing missing key
mechanism: use dict.get() with default value
outcome: return default instead of raising exception

trigger: list IndexError when accessing out-of-bounds index
mechanism: check list length before access or use try/except IndexError
outcome: prevent program crash with graceful handling

trigger: TypeError when function receives wrong argument type
mechanism: validate input types with isinstance() checks
outcome: raise descriptive TypeError with expected types

trigger: ValueError when converting invalid string to number
mechanism: wrap conversion in try/except ValueError block
outcome: catch error and provide fallback or user feedback

trigger: IOError when opening non-existent file
mechanism: use try/except FileNotFoundError or check file existence first
outcome: handle missing file gracefully without crash

trigger: AttributeError when accessing undefined object attribute
mechanism: use hasattr() check before access or try/except AttributeError
outcome: avoid AttributeError with safe attribute lookup

trigger: ZeroDivisionError in mathematical operation
mechanism: check denominator is non-zero before division
outcome: prevent ZeroDivisionError by validating inputs

trigger: Exception raised in try block needs cleanup
mechanism: use finally block or context manager (with statement)
outcome: ensure cleanup code runs regardless of exception

trigger: Resource file left open after exception
mechanism: use context manager (with open()) for file handling
outcome: automatically close file even if exception occurs

trigger: Multiple exception types need different handling
mechanism: use multiple except blocks for specific exception types
outcome: handle each error type appropriately

trigger: Need to execute code after try/except succeeds
mechanism: use try/except/else block structure
outcome: else block only runs if no exception was raised

trigger: Custom business logic error not in standard library
mechanism: define custom exception class inheriting from Exception
outcome: raise and catch domain-specific errors

trigger: Error message lacks context about failure
mechanism: raise exception with descriptive message including variables
outcome: easier debugging with clear error information

trigger: Silent failure makes debugging difficult
mechanism: add logging statements with error details and stack trace
outcome: track errors in log file for post-mortem analysis

trigger: Need to validate assumption about program state
mechanism: use assert statement with message
outcome: fail fast during development if assumption violated

trigger: Cannot debug error without seeing variable values
mechanism: add print statements or use pdb.set_trace()
outcome: inspect program state at specific execution point

trigger: Function parameter validation scattered throughout code
mechanism: validate inputs at function entry with guard clauses
outcome: centralized validation makes code clearer

trigger: Catch-all except clause hides specific errors
mechanism: catch specific exception types instead of bare except
outcome: avoid masking bugs with overly broad exception handling

trigger: Operations that fail temporarily need retry capability
mechanism: implement retry loop with exponential backoff
outcome: transient failures resolved automatically with delays

trigger: Network request timeout needs backoff strategy
mechanism: catch timeout exception and retry with increasing delays
outcome: avoid overwhelming service during temporary outages

trigger: Database connection fails intermittently
mechanism: retry with exponential backoff (2^attempt seconds)
outcome: automatic recovery from transient database unavailability

trigger: Function needs to clean up even if exception occurs
mechanism: use context manager __enter__ and __exit__ methods
outcome: __exit__ always called for resource cleanup

trigger: Multiple resources need cleanup in specific order
mechanism: nest context managers or use contextlib.ExitStack
outcome: cleanup happens in reverse order of acquisition

trigger: Database transaction needs rollback on error
mechanism: use try/except/finally with transaction.rollback() in finally
outcome: partial transaction rolled back preventing data corruption

trigger: Graceful degradation needed when feature unavailable
mechanism: catch feature ImportError and provide fallback implementation
outcome: program continues with reduced functionality

trigger: Need to exit with status code on error
mechanism: use sys.exit(error_code) instead of return
outcome: shell script can detect failure via exit code

trigger: Recursive function may exceed max recursion depth
mechanism: add recursion depth counter and raise RecursionError
outcome: prevent stack overflow with explicit limit

trigger: JSON parsing fails on malformed data
mechanism: wrap json.loads() in try/except json.JSONDecodeError
outcome: invalid JSON handled without crash

trigger: Regular expression matching fails silently
mechanism: use try/except re.error for invalid patterns
outcome: catch malformed regex before applying to data

trigger: Need to log exception with full stack trace
mechanism: use logging.exception() in except block
outcome: log includes full traceback for debugging

trigger: Error occurs in background thread needs handling
mechanism: wrap thread code in try/except with queue for errors
outcome: main thread can catch and process thread errors

trigger: Type hint validation needed at runtime
mechanism: use assert isinstance() or validate_types decorator
outcome: catch type mismatches early in development

trigger: Configuration file missing or invalid
mechanism: use try/except and provide sensible defaults
outcome: program runs with defaults instead of crashing

trigger: External API call fails unpredictably
mechanism: wrap in try/except with timeout and specific error handling
outcome: handle network failures and API errors gracefully

trigger: List comprehension has error in expression
mechanism: move to explicit loop with error handling
outcome: better error messages than generic comprehension failures

trigger: Dictionary update may overwrite important data
mechanism: check key existence before update or use setdefault()
outcome: prevent unintended data loss

trigger: Floating point comparison causes unexpected results
mechanism: use abs(a - b) < epsilon instead of a == b
outcome: prevent errors from floating point precision

trigger: String encoding error when reading text file
mechanism: specify encoding explicitly (UTF-8) when opening file
outcome: handle different file encodings correctly

trigger: Circular import creates ImportError
mechanism: restructure modules to avoid circular dependencies
outcome: modules import successfully without circular errors

trigger: Memory leak from unclosed resources
mechanism: use context managers or explicitly call close()
outcome: resources released automatically

trigger: Debugging print statements left in production code
mechanism: use logging module with levels (DEBUG, INFO, ERROR)
outcome: control output verbosity without code changes

trigger: Exception loses original cause information
mechanism: use raise ... from e to chain exceptions
outcome: preserve full exception traceback for debugging

trigger: Function preconditions violated by caller
mechanism: document preconditions and validate with assertions
outcome: fail fast at precondition violation point

trigger: Partial data corruption from interrupted operation
mechanism: use atomic operations or database transactions
outcome: all-or-nothing semantics prevent partial updates

trigger: Negative array index causes confusion
mechanism: validate index >= 0 before using as array subscript
outcome: catch negative index bugs early

trigger: Date parsing fails with unexpected format
mechanism: use try/except datetime.strptime with multiple format attempts
outcome: handle various date formats gracefully

trigger: Dictionary merge overwrites existing values silently
mechanism: check for key collisions before merge
outcome: aware of data being overwritten

trigger: Timeout error from long-running operation
mechanism: add timeout parameter with exception on timeout
outcome: prevent indefinite blocking

trigger: Empty sequence causes IndexError in loop
mechanism: check sequence length or use for/else pattern
outcome: handle empty sequences without crash

trigger: None value causes AttributeError in chain
mechanism: check for None explicitly or use optional chaining pattern
outcome: prevent AttributeError from None

trigger: Global variable modified unexpectedly in function
mechanism: avoid globals or explicitly mark with global keyword
outcome: make global intent explicit and avoid bugs

trigger: Lambda function has reference to loop variable
mechanism: use default argument to capture loop variable value
outcome: lambda captures correct value not loop's final value

trigger: Generator function stops early without clear reason
mechanism: wrap generator in try/except to catch StopIteration
outcome: understand why generator ended

trigger: Pickle deserialization fails with object version mismatch
mechanism: version objects and handle migration on load
outcome: gracefully handle old pickled object formats

trigger: Regular expression causes catastrophic backtracking
mechanism: use atomic groups or rewrite pattern to be efficient
outcome: regex matching completes in reasonable time

trigger: Socket connection closes unexpectedly
mechanism: catch ConnectionError and implement reconnection logic
outcome: automatic recovery from connection loss

trigger: Multiline string has unexpected whitespace
mechanism: use textwrap.dedent() or triple quotes carefully
outcome: control whitespace in multiline strings

trigger: Default mutable argument shared between calls
mechanism: use None as default and create new object in function
outcome: avoid subtle bugs from shared mutable state

trigger: Division by zero in statistics calculation
mechanism: check count > 0 before computing average
outcome: prevent ZeroDivisionError with validation

trigger: Unicode error when handling international text
mechanism: explicitly encode/decode with UTF-8 and error handling
outcome: handle non-ASCII text without corruption

trigger: KeyboardInterrupt ignored by long operation
mechanism: catch KeyboardInterrupt and exit gracefully
outcome: user can interrupt program with Ctrl+C

trigger: Assertion failures in test code
mechanism: use meaningful assertion messages with context
outcome: test failure messages show what was expected

trigger: Context variable undefined in except block
mechanism: assign exception to variable with 'as e' syntax
outcome: exception details available in except block
